phaseGoal: 把 writeback proposal、stale handoff、缺失证据和外部自我验收等不可信状态接入 recovery / hygiene 判断，避免 Threadsmith 从有风险的 truth 继续普通推进。
deliverable: runtime recovery signal、truth confidence 映射、next best step 路由、对应测试与验证证据。
inScope: 识别待审或不可信 writeback proposal 并路由到 hygiene / recover
把 proposal recovery reason 映射到 truth confidence
让 next best step 优先显示 proposal review / hygiene，而不是继续普通推进
增加 runtime 测试覆盖 proposal recovery 路径
outOfScope: 自动采纳 proposal 并写 committed truth
让外部 agent 直接写 committed truth
stopCondition: runtime 能把 proposal / stale handoff / missing evidence 等不可信状态转成明确 recover/hygiene 建议，并有测试证明不会直接继续普通推进。
